ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text:
rice noodles (82.6%) [rice (90%), modified starch, sugar, salt, flavor enhancer: monosodium glutamate; stabilizer: guar gum],
flavor (10.6%) [salt, whitener (glucose syrup, palm fat, stabilizers (E340, E451); caseinates, emulsifier (E471, E472e); anti-caking agent: E551), flavor enhancers (monosodium glutamate, disodium guanylate, disodium inosinate); sugar, flavor, tapioca, stabilizer: xanthan gum; shallot powder, garlic powder, turmeric powder, color: caramel; ground black pepper, anti-caking agent: E551]; dried vegetables (4.7%) [cabbage, carrots, chives]; oil (2.1%) [refined palm oil, shallots, flavor, antioxidant: E306].
